# CWE-379 safe — Creation of Temporary File in Directory with Insecure Permissions (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-379-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func StageReportDraft(c *GinCtx) error {
	dir, err := os.MkdirTemp("", "reports-*")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if err := os.Chmod(dir, 0700); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	raw := c.Request.URL.Query().Get("id")
	id := filepath.Base(raw)
	path := filepath.Join(dir, "draft-"+id+".json")
	return os.WriteFile(path, []byte(c.Request.PostFormValue("body")), 0600)
}
